system_issues_detected: onchain_collector_red: mempool.json stale ~10h (one-shot collector, runs in pipeline only — not emergency unless pipeline failed)
pipeline_state_not_updated: completed_today shows [] despite morning pipeline running — known logging gap
mode_reporting_mismatch: daily report states 'LIVE' but BYBIT_ACCOUNT_TYPE=demo in .env — reporter using portfolio.demo_mode field (stale) instead of .env; fix required
weekly_verdict: Bootstrap week 1 complete. All fees, no alpha. System migrated to Hermes orchestration. 1 strategy paper-testing. No trades per cold-start protocol. Still in DEMO mode (day 5 of 14).
key_finding: All -1,688 sats gap vs HODL is from bootstrap rebalance fees only. No strategic losses. System operating as designed. Demo mode must remain until cold-start day 14 (June 2).
recommendation_for_next_week: Continue cold-start paper testing through May 31. Monitor strat_001 mean-reversion conditions. Fix reporter mode-detection to read BYBIT_ACCOUNT_TYPE from .env. Fix pipeline_state.json tracking. Schedule onchain collector as 6-hr daemon.
proposal_justification: System only 5 days old, just migrated to Hermes. No evidence-backed gaps in coverage after only ~5 morning pipeline runs. Insufficient data to justify new agent. Re-evaluate next Sunday after full first week of Hermes runs.
chief_review_note: 21:00 AEST Sunday Chief review pass. Journal and memory backup confirmed committed. Mode discrepancy flagged.
